title: SEO Knowledge Rule Update
description: Versioned update to the SEO agent system knowledge base or operating rules.

version.description: Semantic version for this rule update.

target_agent.description: Agent or agent group affected by the update.

source_url.description: URL or durable reference for the source.

new_instruction.description: New operational instruction for affected agents.

validation_check.description: How SEO Scrummaster Agent verifies adoption.

review_date.description: Date when rule should be reviewed, preferably YYYY-MM-DD.

examples.old_context: Some workflows used generic Core Web Vitals language.
examples.new_instruction: Core Web Vitals reviews must explicitly evaluate LCP, INP, and CLS.
examples.validation_check: Technical audit outputs name LCP, INP, and CLS when CWV is in scope.
